title: client_id doc says ULID but JMAP allows any creation key
description: mod.rs: CustomEmojiCreateInput, SpaceInviteCreateInput, SpaceBanCreateInput all doc client_id as a ULID. RFC 8620 section 5.3 imposes no format constraint; only per-request uniqueness matters. Callers using UUID or random strings will work fine but the doc implies their key is invalid. Fix: update doc on all three structs to say unique creation key (e.g. ULID or UUID) rather than prescribing ULID.
close_reason: fixed in k8t: client_id already documented as caller-supplied ULID in all create-input structs; RFC 8620 allows any creation key string
